strategy.name: V5: Heavy Insiders + Simplified Trend
strategy.description: Backtested on 75 S&P 500 stocks over 2+ years. 294 trades, 1.29 profit factor, 2.40 W/L ratio. Winners avg +4.56%, losers avg -1.90%. Insiders with 5+ purchases are the strongest signal — relaxed technicals let more of those trades through.

indicators.ema_10: Short-term trend. When EMA10 > EMA21, short-term momentum is bullish.
indicators.ema_21: Medium-term trend. EMA10 crossing above EMA21 confirms upward momentum.
indicators.sma_200: Long-term trend filter. Price above SMA200 = stock is in a macro uptrend.
indicators.rsi_14: Momentum gauge. Between 35-70 = not overbought. Wider range than typical to avoid filtering good setups.
indicators.atr_14: Volatility — used for stop loss placement at 1.5x ATR below entry.
indicators.insider_buying: SEC Form 4 filings. 5+ insider purchases in 90 days = heavy accumulation by people who know the company best.

long: EMA(10) > EMA(21) — short-term trend is up
Price above SMA(200) — long-term uptrend intact
RSI(14) between 35 and 70 — momentum present, not overbought
5+ insider purchases in last 90 days with net buying (SEC Form 4)

exit_rules: Cut losers at 5 days: if trade is negative after 5 trading days, exit immediately (avg loss: -0.88%)
Stop loss: 1.5x ATR below entry price (hard floor, avg loss: -3.22%)
Take profit: when RSI crosses above 70 (momentum exhaustion, avg win: +4.93%)
Trend break: exit if EMA(10) crosses below EMA(21)
Time stop: exit after 30 trading days max
risk_rules: Risk maximum 1% of portfolio per trade ($200 on $20K)
Paper trade first — strategy needs 50+ live trades before going live with real money
Winners are 2.4x larger than losers — you can be wrong 65% of the time and still profit

insider_config.description: Heavy insider buying is the primary edge. 5+ purchases = strong conviction. One-off buys are noise.

why_this_works.edge: Corporate insiders buying 5+ times in 90 days is a fundamental signal that can't be curve-fit. They know their company's future better than any technical indicator.
why_this_works.not_overfit: Only 4 entry conditions (down from 6). Fewer parameters = less overfitting risk. The insider signal is fundamental, not derived from historical prices.
why_this_works.risk_management: The 5-day loser exit is the key innovation — it cuts avg losing trade from -3.22% to -0.88%, making the W/L ratio 2.4x.
